name: ssm-foundations
description: A lens-led 17-chapter foundations book for post-transformer sequence-model architectures (SSMs, delta-rule, gating, hybrids). Dynamical-systems perspective foregrounded.

scripts.predev: npm run build:bib --if-present && npm run build:labels --if-present
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:bib --if-present && npm run build:labels --if-present && npm run validate
scripts.ci:validate: npm run build:bib && npm run build:labels --if-present && npm run validate
